channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17057] sanity-sec: test_0: cannot touch, permission denied (x86_64)
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3c0f206f-9ab8-4352-bee4-23d4c7b0b2aa

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/97252 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/97252 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

== sanity-sec test 0: uid permission ======================================================================================= 07:47:29 (1693208849)
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
[ls] [/mnt/lustre]
d0.sanity-sec
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
[touch] [/mnt/lustre/f0]
touch: cannot touch '/mnt/lustre/f0': Permission denied
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
[touch] [/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1]
touch: setting times of '/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
sanity-sec test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: touch (2)
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6662:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-sec.sh:156:test_0()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7002:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7051:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6888:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-sec.sh:167:main()
item.summary: sanity-sec: test_0: cannot touch, permission denied (x86_64)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Landed for 2.16

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55628/
Subject: LU-17057 tests: check OSCs FULL state when setting GSS flvr
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 2f4a3f3b55fc8c01967319adf36e1cc70dd73720

"Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55628
Subject: LU-17057 tests: oscs in FULL state when setting gss flavor
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 15f0a2b5404d68d76f4557be530fd2f95070fe4f

"Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55573
Subject: LU-17057 dbg: debug sanity-sec test_0 with SSK
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: f2665ca79212183370521498d8b3d36206f30fb3
It looks like 5 failures in the past week, 4 of them on master, one on b_es6_0.
+1 on master https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f3e73a5f-76d0-4e8d-a0e1-47861ab6e98f
+1 on master: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/448e3b2a-e7d6-4254-a2c4-b406060c34b7
+1 on master: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d8545968-fa3d-47c6-825d-2ef5d0cb61cc

Still failed on master branch in review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2 test sessions:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/6f5e79da-1820-4cb9-9aa3-309638453130
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/90ac75ac-868c-44c5-a0ff-5473f8658ecc
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/93181040-4558-475b-8023-977d6af8a1cb

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54311/
Subject: LU-17057 tests: Fix "...endpoint shutdown" under sanity-sec
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 24ae2519acd15691d9e319ffc8675cee60529b95

"Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54311
Subject: LU-17057 tests: Fix "...endpoint shutdown" under sanity-sec
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7dd77f46c1cddb456e46b2064b3c8a7d3f2e2d72
Got it. Thanks

Yes please. Maybe add many Test-Parameters lines like this:

Test-Parameters: mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 osscount=1 ostcount=8 clientcount=2 testlist=sanity-sec env=SHARED_KEY=true,ONLY=0

Multiple lines are needed, because repeating test_0 in the same session would not exercise what we want.
Seb, can I put a patch with your hints?

I can see there is a wait_ssk function defined in sanity-sec.sh:

wait_ssk() {
	# wait for SSK flavor to be applied if necessary
	if $GSS_SK; then
		if $SK_S2S; then
			wait_flavor all2all $SK_FLAVOR
		else
			wait_flavor cli2mdt $SK_FLAVOR
			wait_flavor cli2ost $SK_FLAVOR
		fi
	fi
}

It would need to be moved up in the file, and called at the end of the sec_setup() function.

Was expecting "permission" related errors. From last time I checked, nothing on MDS/OSS pointed errors or eviction. I did not realise it happened 10 times since then.  Should we check if exports/everything is sane before calling this command? 

[touch] [/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1]
touch: setting times of '/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
This is still failing testing, 10 times in the past week.

+1 on master https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1565f96b-6e06-48aa-826b-03b00069bbdb

 

  • == sanity-sec test 0: uid permission ======================================================================================= 09:00:37 (1708074037)
    running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
    [ls] [-ali] [/mnt/lustre]
    total 12
    144115188193296385 drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root 4096 Feb 16 09:00 .
    262146 drwxr-xr-x. 4 root root 4096 Feb 16 07:11 ..
    144116648113078275 drwxr-xr-x. 2 sanityusr root 4096 Feb 16 09:00 d0.sanity-sec
    running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
    [touch] [/mnt/lustre/f0]
    touch: cannot touch '/mnt/lustre/f0': Permission denied
    running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
    [touch] [/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1]
    touch: setting times of '/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
    sanity-sec test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: touch (2) Failed
    Trace dump:
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6962:error()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-sec.sh:166:test_0()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7302:run_one()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7362:run_one_logged()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7188:run_test()
    = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-sec.sh:190:main()
    Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.*.1708074038.log
    CMD: trevis-102vm6,trevis-102vm7,trevis-93vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-93vm2,trevis-93vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log;
    dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log
    CMD: trevis-102vm6,trevis-102vm7,trevis-93vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-93vm2,trevis-93vm3 find /tmp/test-framework-keys -name '*.key' -exec /usr/sbin/lgss_sk -r {} \; &> /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.ssk_keys.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log
    CMD: trevis-102vm6 lctl get_param 'nodemap..' > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.nodemaps.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log
    CMD: trevis-102vm6,trevis-102vm7,trevis-93vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-93vm2,trevis-93vm3 keyctl show > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.keyring.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log
    CMD: trevis-102vm6,trevis-102vm7,trevis-93vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-93vm2,trevis-93vm3 journalctl -a > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-16/lustre-reviews_review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2_102220_25_1091b743-77a9-4ae8-9b0f-8ac6a442c285//sanity-sec.test_0.journal.\$(hostname -s).1708074038.log

OST 1, OST 2, OST 3, OST 4, OST 5, OST 6, OST 7, OST 8 (trevis-93vm3)
Landed for 2.16

Subject: LU-17057 tests: Fix sanity-sec/0
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 0b5e252d973e00200660a81f1cdb440f8f4f1886

Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: c9b2b7b5f79060402c6e646e56bbdb20948633f3

still failing occasionally:

touch: cannot touch '/mnt/lustre/f0': Permission denied
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 500/500/500/500, groups:
 [touch] [/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1]
touch: setting times of '/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity-sec/f1': Cannot send after transport endpoint shutdown
 sanity-sec test_0: @@@@@@ FAIL: touch (2)

MDS

[ 1195.730239] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /etc/lustre
[ 1196.001177] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param -N mdt.*MDT*0
[ 1196.267654] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.identity_upcall
[ 1196.532960] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.identity_upcall /usr/sbin/l_getidentity
